title: Gwen, the Book of Sand
original_title: Gwen et le livre de sable
overview: Gwen is a young girl adopted by a nomad tribe in a desert post-apocalyptic world. When Gwen's friend is kidnapped, she and an old woman called Roseline embark on a trip to bring him back.
